textByHashes.6006b0d7d2d013471b6657f0fe18291b05eefcf5: At the next council meeting, I'm going to recommend that we change the guards' uniform to be red.
textByHashes.72fd03f29a809193fbb8794da0c069d49be55975: We have surface-dwellers coming down into our mines and our city now, and remember that they don't have very good eyesight.
textByHashes.049687fccc92e678e7431ba511ac070af264a5c5: I worry that they can't see our guards very clearly in the dark. It is important for a guard to be seen.
textByHashes.1269b49d14ee7105d19774d0800123d0ad2c1633: What colour do you suggest, then?
textByHashes.9fdbbc30fab90eedb01f318d29424f5ef2ea2f02: No, I disagree. Guards should not be soothing, they should be seen as formidable. Red will give the correct impression.
textByHashes.a1b6776bc858aedd2782765eb0e63b4897ceb8aa: No, thank you. We don't let any one single goblin make decisions, and certainly not an outsider!
textByHashes.e148f7f09f8ca41233cb497025e2441dd49aca54: Thank you, surface-dweller. That's what I'll be recommending in the next meeting.
textByHashes.ed3b6a6eb9099fd9497527f874122773c02ef47c: Perhaps you're right. Not making any change would certainly be the easiest option!
textByHashes.6b33b29056fbce445cb022003158f6044d7b51f5: You know, I think that's probably what we'll end up doing.
